whoWeAre.title: 회사 소개
paragraphs: For over three decades, AceTec has stood at the intersection of global embedded technology and Korea's most demanding industries. What began as a specialized distributor has evolved into a full-spectrum technology partner — one that not only supplies world-class hardware and software, but engineers custom solutions from the ground up through our own R&D center.

We pioneered Korea's first desktop-type fanless industrial PC, setting an industry benchmark that still defines our approach: solve real problems with robust, purpose-built technology. Today, our platforms operate inside naval combat systems, railway interlocking networks, steel mill production lines, and defense simulation environments — anywhere failure is not an option.

Backed by strategic partnerships with Abaco Systems, HIMA, Wind River, RTI, OKTAL-SE, Cambridge Pixel, OneStopSystems, Pentek, and SMART Embedded Computing, we bring proven global technology with deep local engineering expertise. Our clients — from the Agency for Defense Development and POSCO to Hyundai and Hanwha Systems — trust us because we deliver not just products, but outcomes.

ceo.title: CEO 인사말
ceo.quote: Our mission is to deliver the most reliable embedded solutions where failure is simply not an option.
paragraphs: Since our founding in 1994, AceTec has spent over 30 years building deep expertise in the embedded computing industry. We started with a vision to bring world-class embedded technology to Korea's most demanding sectors — and today that vision drives everything we do.

We were the first in Korea to develop a desktop-type fanless industrial PC, earning a US patent for our natural cooling technology. This pioneering spirit continues to define us — we don't just distribute technology, we engineer solutions that our clients can stake their operations on.

Through strategic partnerships with leading global companies including Abaco Systems, HIMA, Wind River, and RTI, we combine proven international technology with our own deep local engineering expertise. Our in-house R&D center allows us to customize and validate every solution before it reaches the field.

As embedded systems become ever more critical in defense, transportation, energy, and industrial automation, AceTec will continue to grow as a trusted partner — delivering technology that performs when it matters most.
ceo.signature: — Jang Jeong Hoon, CEO, AceTec Co., Ltd.

philosophy.title: 경영 철학
philosophy.subtitle: 모든 의사결정을 이끄는 세 가지 원칙

items.title: 고객 만족
items.description: We place customer success at the center of our business. Every product, every project, and every support interaction is measured by one standard: did we exceed expectations? Our 300+ institutional clients and 487+ project deliveries reflect our relentless commitment to results.

items.title: Communication-Centered
items.description: Technology partnerships thrive on transparency and trust. We maintain open, proactive communication with our clients and global partners alike — ensuring that requirements are understood, timelines are met, and challenges are addressed before they become problems.

items.title: Technology-Centered
items.description: At our core, we are engineers. We invest continuously in R&D, maintain deep technical expertise across embedded platforms, and stay ahead of industry evolution. From VxWorks BSP porting to SIL4-certified safety systems, our technical depth is our competitive advantage.

culture.title: 기업 문화
culture.subtitle: The values that define how we work and grow together

items.title: 창의성
items.description: We encourage innovative thinking and creative problem-solving. When standard solutions fall short, we engineer new ones — like our patented fanless cooling technology that set a national benchmark.

items.title: 헌신
items.description: Passion for technology and care for our people. We foster a supportive environment where expertise is shared, mentorship is valued, and every team member contributes to our collective mission.

items.title: 도전
items.description: We embrace difficult problems. From mission-critical defense systems to nuclear power plant controls, we take on the projects that demand the highest standards — and deliver every time.

partnerCta.title: 파트너십
partnerCta.description: Seeking a technology partner for your next program? Share your requirements and our team will respond within one business day.
